name: workflow profile registration unregister removes a stage from the profile yaml
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'workflow_stages: [architect, build]\nrules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/register-profile.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml --unregister-stage build 2>err.txt && ! grep -q 'build' profiles/p.yaml && grep -q 'architect' profiles/p.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
